purpose: Shows the user's current location within a hierarchy and lets them navigate back to ancestor pages. Appears above the page title and provides one-click traversal upward through the app structure.
whenToUse: App has deep hierarchy (depth > 1) and user navigation comes from above
Object Page or List Report screens where users drill in from a parent
When users need to navigate back to ancestor contexts without using browser back
When the path itself carries meaning users may want to share or bookmark
whenNotToUse: On root pages (Home) where there is no parent hierarchy
When app navigation is shallow (1 level only)
On worklist screens where users come from a single 'my queue' entry point
doRules: Place the Breadcrumb above the page title in the DynamicPageTitle component
Show the full path from root to current page
Make every item before current a clickable link (sapLinkColor)
Render the current item as plain text (not a link)
Use forward slash ('/') as separator between items
dontRules: Do not include the current page as a clickable link
Do not show more than 5 levels — collapse middle levels with ellipsis if deeper
Do not use Breadcrumb in lieu of a working back button
Do not use bold or large fonts — Breadcrumb is supporting context, not primary
Do not hardcode colors — bind to sapLinkColor / sapContent_LabelColor

layoutGuidance.placement: Top of page header, above the H1 Title within DynamicPageTitle.
layoutGuidance.sizing: Auto height (single line). Each item auto-width.

contentGuidance.labelLength: Match the destination page title verbatim. 1-3 words per item.
contentRules: Use the same exact label as the destination page header
Avoid abbreviations unless the destination page itself uses them

responsiveBehavior.XL: Show full path at all levels.
responsiveBehavior.L: Show full path at all levels.
responsiveBehavior.M: If path > 4 items, collapse middle items with '…' button.
responsiveBehavior.S: Show only current + immediate parent; offer '…' menu for deeper ancestors.

accessibilityGuidance.ariaPattern: Wrap in <nav aria-label='Breadcrumb'>. Final item gets aria-current='page'.
accessibilityGuidance.contrast: Link items meet 4.5:1 against page bg (WCAG AA). Current item meets text contrast standards.
accessibilityGuidance.keyboard: Tab to enter; left/right arrow not used (single linear order is fine). Enter to follow link.
accessibilityGuidance.screenReader: Reads as 'Breadcrumb, list of N, X of N, link, ...; current page, ...'

patterns: List Report — include when accessed from a parent section
Drill-down detail — required to make 'back to list' obvious
exceptions: Single-level apps (no hierarchy) — omit Breadcrumb entirely
Mobile / narrow viewport — use a back button + page title, no breadcrumb trail
